notes:
v0.5.0 — Voquence learns your words.

New: a Custom Dictionary. Add the names, brands, pen names, and jargon Voquence keeps mishearing (your company name, a client, an acronym) and it'll spell them right from now on, even offline.

It works three ways at once: it nudges the transcription toward your words while it listens, cleans up close misspellings after (so 'Vokance' becomes 'Voquence'), and tells the AI your terms on the polish modes. Find it in Settings, right under Local Whisper. Type a word, hit Add, done. The auto-correct toggle is on by default and can be turned off if it ever over-corrects.

This runs on every mode, including the free Raw Transcript, so your proper nouns come out right whether or not you use the AI modes.
